name: Coffee Liqueur Mold (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in the coffee liqueur.
2. Dissolve the softened gelatin in hot coffee.
3. Add sugar and stir until fully dissolved.
4. Cool mixture to lukewarm temperature.
5. Stir in cream until well combined.
6. Pour the mixture into a mold.
7. Chill until set.
8. To serve, turn out of the mold onto a serving plate.
9. If desired, top with whipped cream and sprinkle with chopped pecans.
